title: I was stuck at $150/mo for 2 years. One change took me to $8.6K MRR. Here's the honest breakdown.
summary: Two years. That's how long I sat at ~$150/month with my SaaS before anything clicked. I'm a solo founder with a full-time 9-5, so I want to share the honest version of what finally worked - including the parts that didn't. What I'm building: an AI rendering tool for architects and interior designers. You describe a space, it generates a realistic render. The space is crowded, so that's not the interesting part.
